command:
python -c 
import urllib.request, json

# Try PMC efetch to get full text XML
url = 'https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/efetch.fcgi?db=pmc&id=PMC2669973&rettype=full&retmode=xml'
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'research bot mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk'})
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as resp:
        data = resp.read()
        print(f'Size: {len(data):,} bytes')
        print(f'Content-Type: {resp.headers.get("Content-Type","")}')
        print(f'First 300 bytes: {data[:300]}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Error: {e}')
